question: Analyzing the performance index by year, which statement is best supported by the chart?

options.A: The index is the same for the last two years.
options.B: The index was highest in the last two years, but their exact values are not fully shown on the chart.
options.D: The index was highest in the first year.

explanation: The y-axis maximum is below the data maximum, so the top bars are truncated and appear equal.
